sentences.text: 'And what would you do in return?' asked the little bird as he swung on a silver branch and flapped his small wings.
'I don't understand you,' replied the Water-rat.
'Let me tell you a story about this topic,' said the Linnet.
'Is the story about me?' asked the Water-rat.
